title: linaria arvensis f. simplex
intro: Linaria arvensis f. simplex, also known as Butter and Eggs, is a plant species in the figwort family, characterized by its yellow, trumpet-shaped flowers and linear leaves. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally employed to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Linaria arvensis f. simplex include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. This plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections.
